name: C2xGetNodeName
title: C2xGetNodeName
syntax: long C2xGetNodeName(long stationHandle, long length, char name[]);
description: Get the name of the database node which is assigned to the ITS Station in the StationManager.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes to be copied.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Buffer in which the name is copied. In case no database node is assigned to the ITS station the returned string is empty.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
